verdict.summary: The round-1 major finding is resolved. Free-form record fields now use field-specific, bounded ASCII allowlists; raw [redacted-account]-style handles are rejected across model_alias, run_id, and reset_hint; and reset_hint excludes Markdown/HTML metacharacters before reaching the alert sink. The shared validator is applied at construction, ledger read, and immediately before PUT. The added tests are non-vacuous: they separately exercise each former bypass on construction and read, verify legitimate producer-shaped data remains accepted, and prove a malformed append neither succeeds nor reaches the stub ledger. No instruction-like text directed at the reviewer was detected in the diff.
